text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “04” (1915(a) voluntary managed care program) in any 
instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD. Please note that this indicator is not set to 1 when there 
is an instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD set to “06,” “13,” “16” or “20” (1915(a) operating 
authority concurrent with another operating authority). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
